title: New World
description: A mod that focuses on prehistoric life and genetics.
body:
![Alpha v02 out now](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7794b6453e8c418321113e85f9aa24e94b553fb8_0.webp)
### **Let your imagination fly! We give you the tools, it's on your hands what you do with those tools.**

The wonders of the past are now the wonders of the future, and you have the power to bring them back from extinction.
Clone extinct animals; play with the different decoration options and building materials and create your own Jurassic Park!

![Install](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48884029e523cc9b3bb09b68e57663c70345daf3.png)

New World runs in NeoForge 1.21.
New World requires, [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib/version/kFy9fnMx) and [Terrablender](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender/version/xBeonLfL)

This mod is in early alpha stages, so you may encounter bugs and glitches. To report them, you can join our Discord server.
